creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks Kai, looks good. 

1) Since setup.py 'test' is deprecated (setuptools, et al), are you able to switch this to use unittest directly? One of the following should just work:

- `python -m unittest -v` (shortcut for 'unittest discover')
- `python -m unittest -v tests`

2) Please include changelog link and MFH: <branch|No> <reason> in commit log message
